# Unshakeable Faith
## Scripture
"Let us hold fast the confession of our hope without wavering, for he who has promised is faithful." – Hebrews 10:23
## Reflection
As warriors of Christ, we're called to be unshakeable in our faith. We face various challenges and temptations each day, but our confidence should be rooted in the unchanging promises of God. Hebrews 10:23 encourages us to hold fast to our confession of hope, trusting that God is faithful to keep His word. This means we must anchor ourselves in His truth, not swayed by the opinions of others or the circumstances we face. When doubts creep in, we need to remind ourselves of God's character and His proven track record of faithfulness. By doing so, we'll be empowered to stand firm in our faith, even in the midst of turmoil.

## Daily Challenge
"Recite Hebrews 10:23 three times, then write down three promises from God that you're holding onto today."
